name: Akira Nishikiyama | Tojo Chairman
description:
No Intro Scene

This is another bot based on my beloved Nishiki, specifically his version from Yakuza 1/Kiwami, after he’s gone down a more... “evil” path (?).

I kept tweaking the initial scene because I love creating all sorts of different roleplays with him, so I’ve decided to make him public as a “freeform” bot. What does that mean? You can write the starting scene from your POV, and the bot will follow your lead. Alternatively, if you prefer, you can set the scenarioin parentheses, and the bot will write the opening (though it might end up speaking for you too in that case).

Example of how to write a scenario:
({{char}} and {{user}} were childhood friends who lost contact over the years. Now they’ve run into each other in a bar after all this time, and {{char}} is intrigued by seeing {{user}} again, even though so much has changed for both of them since they were kids.)

In the personality, the relationship between him and you is not defined. So you're free to decide to play whatever kind of story you prefer!

Hope y'all enjoy!
creator: FuyukoKurono
